name: noveltts
description: Multi-voice audiobook generator from EPUB uploads

scripts.dev: concurrently -n FRONTEND,BACKEND,WORKER -c blue,green,yellow "pnpm dev:frontend" "pnpm dev:backend" "pnpm dev:worker"
scripts.dev:backend: dotenv -e .env -v UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT=backend/.uv-venv -- uv run --project backend uvicorn --app-dir backend app.main:app --reload --port 8010
